rationale: Top-of-form LP name. Form serves both Maine domestic and foreign LPs from a single 'entity.name' widget — the SECOND/FIRST jurisdiction block disambiguates foreign LPs.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The jurisdiction of its organization is
rationale: State or country of organization (for a domestic LP, 'Maine'; for a foreign LP, the home jurisdiction).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date the current year's annual report was filed
rationale: Date the original annual report (the one being amended) was filed with SOS. Anchor for the §1330.2 amendment-window check.

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 1

rationale: Multi-line text widget for the substantive change description. Indexed line1–line8 mirroring the upstream amendment.nature_and_text.lineN pattern (NP_MNP-9).

Date the amended annual report was signed.
Printed name of the individual GP signer (per-officer signer pattern; only one inline slot since §1324.1.J requires only one GP signature). Same shape as MLPA-12A, MLPA-12B, MLPA-17.
